OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Return matching funding opportunities based on the project description.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: GrantIntakeAnalyzeProject

omniProcessElements.name: FundingOpportunitySearch
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "show" : null, "failOnStepError" : true, "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "ignoreCache" : true, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "fundingSearch", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { }, "useFormulas" : true, "bundle" : "DRXFundingOpportunitySearch", "sendJSONNode" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: NormalizeAiResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "remoteMethod" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "analysisMapped:projectDescription" : "%TransformInput:searchText%", "analysisMapped:aiSummary" : "", "analysisMapped:confidenceScore" : "", "analysisMapped:keywords" : "=[]", "analysisMapped:recommendedFundingTypes" : "=[]", "analysisMapped:fundingOpportunities" : "=%fundingSearch%" }, "failOnStepError" : false, "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "remoteClass" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "id" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "restOptions" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Response
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "show" : null, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "isActive" : true, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "additionalOutput" : { "analysisSuccess" : "=true", "analysisErrorMessage" : null, "searchText" : "=%TransformInput:searchText%", "fundingOpportunities" : "=%fundingSearch%", "fundingOpportunityTableRows" : "=%fundingSearch%", "filteredFundingOpportunities" : "=[]", "topFundingOpportunities" : "=[]", "initialAiAssessment" : { "projectDescription" : "=%analysisMapped:projectDescription%", "aiSummary" : "=%analysisMapped:aiSummary%", "confidenceScore" : "=%analysisMapped:confidenceScore%", "keywords" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%analysisMapped:keywords%),[],%analysisMapped:keywords%)", "recommendedFundingTypes" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%analysisMapped:recommendedFundingTypes%),[],%analysisMapped:recommendedFundingTypes%)", "fundingOpportunities" : "=%fundingSearch%" }, "context" : { "projectDescription" : "=%TransformInput:searchText%", "analysisSuccess" : "=true", "analysisErrorMessage" : null, "fundingOpportunities" : "=%fundingSearch%" } }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "useFormulas" : true, "sendJSONNode" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: TransformInput
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "remoteMethod" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "searchText" : "=IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%context:projectDescription%)),%context:projectDescription%,IF(NOT(ISBLANK(%projectDescription%)),%projectDescription%,%Step_ProjectDiscovery:Inp_ProjectDescription%))" }, "failOnStepError" : false, "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "remoteClass" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "id" : "", "useFormulas" : false, "restOptions" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "" }
